title: Korbond 24 Piece Black & White Stick On Hook & Loop Dots –12 Sets of Small & Large Self Adhesive Hook & Loop Dots
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories

Pack Contains: x 3 White 1.5cm Hook Dots, x 3 White 1.5cm Loop Dots, x 3 Black 1.5cm Hook Dots, x 3 Black 1.5cm Loop Dots, x 3 White 2cm Hook Dots, x 3 White 2cm Loop Dots, x 3 Black 2cm Hook Dots, x 3 Black 2cm Loop Dots

Korbond Handy Dots are convenient self-adhesive dots for use at home, work or in the car. The hook & loop mechanism allows for quick and simple attachment and detachment of light objects and materials
The Korbond Range of Hook & Loop features 7 variations of Iron On, Stick On, Sew On and Combination packs as well as handy Hook & Loop Dots all in black or white options
To view our full range, click on ''by Korbond'' Above to visit our store
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Hook & Loop Korbond Hook & Loop range is a complete collection of alternative fastenings. Quick and versatile, Hook and Loop allows application to a wide range of home furnishings, solid materials and general craft projects. Complete Range Korbond's range of Hook & Loop covers every fastening type, from fabric to fabric bonding, to bonding two solid surfaces. Not just for the experienced crafter who can sew on Hook & Loop with ease, Korbond's Stick On and Iron On variations ensure the range is inclusive to all abilities. Attach cushions to a bench, or create quick closures in hand crafted Halloween costumes.
